## Why    IKIGAI    Real    Estate

At IKIGAI Real Estate, we believe that finding your ‘Why’ is key to achieving your real estate goals.

That is why we offer comprehensive assistance with what, where, and how to buy and / or sell properties in Dubai.

As a boutique Real Estate company registered with the Real Estate Regulatory Agency (RERA),

we specialize in Buying and Selling properties, Leasing Residential and Commercial properties, and providing

Property Supervision Management Services. We uphold client confidentiality and client privileges.

As a boutique agency we provide niche services with a personal touch, including

assistance with ROI (Return on Investment) and arranging finance, among others. Our team of experienced Real Estate Professionals is dedicated to providing exceptional customer service, tailored to meet the unique needs of each client.

With a collective real estate experience of over twenty-two plus years in the Dubai market,

we have an in-depth understanding of the local market trends and can help you make informed decisions.

At IKIGAI Real Estate, we take pride in offering personalized services that prioritize client satisfaction.

Find out more to learn about how we can help you achieve your real estate goals.

[Find Out More](https://ikigaire.ae/about-us/)

![Ikigai Real Estate Broker place picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/fevicon-1.svg)

[Ikigai Real Estate Broker](https://search.google.com/local/reviews?placeid=ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho)

5.0

powered by Google

[review us on](https://search.google.com/local/writereview?placeid=ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho)

![Arjun Bansal profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_0b9f7e6dc2f08ed8ad5eb2d8450ce6d1.jpg)

[Arjun Bansal](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/104630466946151701181/reviews)

7 months ago

We recently invested in a property in Dubai through Ikigai Real Estate. They supported us since the very beginning and understood our requirements at every step. They helped us narrow down to the property we love, guided us through the process and coordinated with the developer at every step.

We will definitely recommend them to our family and friends.

![Simran Dhingra profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_ee58935bb1690e9579c717457272200b.jpg)

[Simran Dhingra](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111629681309648137264/reviews)

7 months ago

Ikigai’s Naina Arora recently helped me find my dream apartment in Dubai. She understood my vision deeply and helped me find something that ticked all the boxes at a good rental cost. I look forward to working with her again once I’m ready to buy!

![Kaz K profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_d2a551457fdc1f42b93a68e4da3eb867.jpg)

[Kaz K](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/103156449734211121164/reviews)

8 months ago

Naina was great and I recommend working with her - she helped us find our new home.

![büşra yıldız profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_ad2aa293d522cd9d1ca8511df7293154.jpg)

[büşra yıldız](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110111876373502583030/reviews)

8 months ago

I had a great experience with Ikigai Real Estate! The team was professional, responsive, and really supportive throughout the whole process. I especially want to thank Carolin, who went above and beyond to help me. She was kind, attentive, and always available to answer my questions.

Carolin made everything smooth and stress-free I truly felt like I was in good hands. I would highly recommend Ikigai Real Estate to anyone looking for a trustworthy and efficient agency in Dubai. Thank you again!

![Vinay Kochhar profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_ec553331ddd22d9b63f1eb5009005c61.jpg)

[Vinay Kochhar](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111666410318324448341/reviews)

8 months ago

We recently moved into a villa in Green Community Society, and I can confidently say that our experience wouldn’t have been this smooth without the amazing support of Shalini from Ikigai Real Estate. Not only did she help me find the perfect villa, but she also helped my brother secure a villa in the same community.

From day one, Shalini was extremely proactive—not just in finding us the right homes, but also in making sure we were fully supported during the move. She connected us with the right people to help with relocation and settling down, which made the entire process stress-free.

What truly sets her apart is her care and follow-up after the deal was done. She checked in multiple times—not just with me, but also with my wife—to make sure we were comfortable and had everything we needed. That level of service is rare.

Truly grateful for her help. If you’re looking for a professional, caring, and dependable agent in Dubai, I highly recommend Shalini at Ikigai Real Estate.

![Radha Kochhar profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_bbd8efa089150197f758fce3b42e238f.jpg)

[Radha Kochhar](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/110242095931426268846/reviews)

8 months ago

Recently we take a rented villa in Dubai ( Green community) from Ikigai Real Estate…My experience was really very good…and I m more than 100 percent satisfied..The renting process is very simple and we dont need to do anything ..as Shalini ji itself takes all the things on them and make things easy for us ..Really appreciated and recommend to my friends who are reading this review .. 😊

![Ajay Kochhar profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_6782e50e5b3c962a352d3c4b8024bdc5.jpg)

[Ajay Kochhar](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/102841101995736392506/reviews)

8 months ago

My experience of renting a Villa with Ikigai Real Estate has been smooth, transparent and without any hassle. I am more than 100% satisfied with my experience of dealing with Shalini at Ikigai. The renting process was not only smooth but the after service that we received was phenomenal. Shalini made sure that she checked each and every thing with us while the property was getting ready for our occupation. In fact, she sourced a property for us that matched our exact requirement including Vastu and a wonderful landlord. I am really more than satisfied.I will definitely refer our friends and family to Ikigai Real Estate and inspire them to work with them because for Ikigai, client comes first.

![S JL profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_d5ca2f6f42f54107a3c797d5337cf504.jpg)

[S JL](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/112595268739576070182/reviews)

9 months ago

I recently had the pleasure of working with Ikigai Real Estate, who approached me on behalf of their client to rent out my property in Dubai Investment Park.

From start to finish, Shalini and her team were exceptional—highly professional, responsive, and thorough throughout the entire process. What truly stood out was their continued involvement even after the initial agreements were signed. In an industry where many agents tend to disappear once the deposit and first payment are made, Shalini and her team went above and beyond, ensuring smooth coordination between the tenant and me on several follow-up matters.

This level of dedication is rare in the rental market, and I genuinely can’t think of a better team to handle such transactions. I highly recommend Ikigai Real Estate and look forward to working with them again in the future.

![Brijesh Zaveri profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_c9824da5ace68f7ed818069b533f2e6a.jpg)

[Brijesh Zaveri](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/108244425208217431755/reviews)

a year ago

Nelson is an exceptional professional with in-depth expertise in Dubai's real estate market. His extensive knowledge spans residential, commercial, and investment properties, making him a go-to expert for buyers, sellers, and investors.

With a keen understanding of market trends, property valuation, and legal regulations, Nelson provides strategic insights to help clients make informed decisions. His personalized approach, strong negotiation skills, and commitment to client success set him apart in the industry.

![M Mt profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_5e5a7b74239d416bb7b4cfe30c3c5c81.jpg)

[M Mt](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/100067864453884996601/reviews)

a year ago

Before investing in Dubai’s real estate market, I was concerned about market fluctuations, legal complexities, and long-term returns. I had many questions about regulations, ROI potential, and the overall investment climate.

What stood out about Ikigai Real Estate was their deep market knowledge and client-focused approach. Shalini and her team patiently educated me on different opportunities, helping me make an informed decision. Their insights on market trends and investment hotspots gave me the confidence to move forward.

The guidance I received was exceptional—every recommendation was backed by thorough research and real-time market data. The transaction process was smooth and transparent, with their proactive support ensuring all paperwork was handled seamlessly.

I’m especially pleased with my property’s prime location, strong rental yield, and overall quality—it’s exactly what I was looking for. Ikigai also manages both my properties through their Property Supervision services, giving me peace of mind while I’m abroad.

For anyone considering investing in Dubai’s real estate, I highly recommend working with a team that prioritizes your interests. Ikigai Real Estate ensures your investment aligns with your goals while minimizing risks. I will definitely invest with them again for their expertise, integrity, and commitment.

![J Cha profile picture](https://ikigaire.ae/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/ChIJlW_byjhzXz4Rm_5WHumeJho_6e1840f6ada6bd152651af24bea9f5fb.jpg)

[J Cha](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/116187968395482233621/reviews)

a year ago

I recently moved into my new apartment with the help of Ikigai Real Estate, and the experience was fantastic, especially thanks to Kiralyn. She really took the time to understand my needs and recommended the perfect apartment for me. Kiralyn was attentive to all my questions and ensured the apartment was in top condition—AC serviced, walls freshly painted, and deep cleaning done to perfection, even down to the closets. The process was smooth and stress-free, and I couldn’t be happier with the service from Ikigai Real Estate. Highly recommend working with Kiralyn!

## It’s    All    About    Your    “WHY”      We    Help    You    With    What,    Where    &    How

IKIGAI Real Estate is a boutique Real Estate company in Dubai, UAE, registered with Real Estate Regulatory Agency (RERA).

IKIGAI is in the business of Buying and Selling of propertiesfor their clients,Leasing of Residential and Commercial propertyand, Property Supervision Management Service.

The Company brings a team of experiencedReal Estate Professionals together, offering distinctive customer service.

The team’s knowledge of Dubai and its Real Estate Market arises from being long term residents of Dubai and having a collective real estate experience of more than twenty-two plus years in the market.

It prides itself in offering a personalized service focused on client satisfaction.

[View All Properties](https://ikigaire.ae/property-listing/)

data.summary: Ikigai Real Estate specializes in helping clients find their ideal properties in Dubai, offering services for buying, selling, leasing residential and commercial properties, and property management. The company emphasizes personalized assistance, ensuring client satisfaction through comprehensive support in real estate decisions. They feature a range of properties, including off-plan investments, with options like apartments, villas, and commercial spaces. Ikigai's team has over 22 years of collective experience in the Dubai market, delivering tailored services and insights into market trends.
